title: Using grantsgov
text: package documents API paths, auth header, supported search filters, sort fields, extract filters, rate-limit headers checked error handler.
code: grant_endpoints()$endpoints #> $search_opportunities #> $search_opportunities$method #> [1] "POST" #>  #> $search_opportunities$path #> [1] "/v1/opportunities/search" #>  #> $search_opportunities$function_name #> [1] "grant_search_opportunities" #>  #>  #> $search_agencies #> $search_agencies$method #> [1] "POST" #>  #> $search_agencies$path #> [1] "/v1/agencies/search" #>  #> $search_agencies$function_name #> [1] "grant_search_agencies" #>  #>  #> $get_opportunity #> $get_opportunity$method #> [1] "GET" #>  #> $get_opportunity$path #> [1] "/v1/opportunities/{opportunity_id}" #>  #> $get_opportunity$function_name #> [1] "grant_get_opportunity" #>  #>  #> $get_opportunity_legacy #> $get_opportunity_legacy$method #> [1] "GET" #>  #> $get_opportunity_legacy$path #> [1] "/v1/opportunities/{legacy_opportunity_id}" #>  #> $get_opportunity_legacy$function_name #> [1] "grant_get_opportunity_legacy" #>  #>  #> $list_extracts #> $list_extracts$method #> [1] "POST" #>  #> $list_extracts$path #> [1] "/v1/extracts" #>  #> $list_extracts$function_name #> [1] "grant_list_extracts" #>  #>  #> $common_grants #> $common_grants$list_opportunities$function_name #> [1] "grant_common_grants_list_opportunities" #>  #>  #> $common_grants$search_opportunities #> $common_grants$search_opportunities$method #> [1] "POST" #>  #> $common_grants$search_opportunities$path #> [1] "/common-grants/opportunities/search" #>  #> $common_grants$search_opportunities$function_name #> [1] $organizations$create_invitation$function_name #> [1] "grant_create_organization_invitation" #>  #>  #> $organizations$list_invitations #> $organizations$list_invitations$method #> [1] "POST" #>  #> $organizations$remove_user$function_name #> [1] "grant_remove_organization_user" #>  #>  #> $organizations$update_user_roles #> $organizations$update_user_roles$method #> [1] "PUT" #>  #> $organizations$update_user_roles$path #> [1] "/v1/organizations/{organization_id}/users/{user_id}" #>  #> $organizations$update_user_roles$function_name #> [1] "grant_update_organization_user_roles" #>  #>  #>  #> $health #> $health$method #> [1] "GET" #>  #> $health$path #> [1] "/health" #>  #> $health$function_name #> [1] "grant_health" grant_endpoints()$endpoints$health #> $method #> [1] "GET" #>  #> $path #> [1] "/health" #>  #> $function_name #> [1] "grant_health" grant_search_options()$filters #>  [1] "top_level_agency"                "funding_instrument"              #>  [3] "funding_category"                "applicant_type"                  #>  [5] "opportunity_status"              "post_date"                       #>  [7] "close_date"                      "award_floor"                     #>  [9] "award_ceiling"                   "expected_number_of_awards"       #> [11] "estimated_total_program_funding" "assistance_listing_number"       #> [13] "is_cost_sharing" grant_search_options()$sort_by #>  [1] "relevancy"             "opportunity_id"        "opportunity_number"    #>  [4] "opportunity_title"     "post_date"             "close_date"            #>  [7] "agency_code"           "agency_name"           "top_level_agency_name" #> [10] "award_floor"           "award_ceiling" grant_extract_options() #> $filters #> [1] "extract_type" "created_at"   #>  #> $extract_type #> [1] "opportunities_json" "opportunities_csv"  #>  #> $sort_by #> [1] "created_at" #>  #> $sort_direction #> [1] "ascending"  "descending" grant_rate_limit_headers() #> [1] "retry-after"           "x-ratelimit-limit"     "x-ratelimit-remaining" #> [4] "x-ratelimit-reset"     "ratelimit-limit"       "ratelimit-remaining"   #> [7] "ratelimit-reset"

what: Common use case: find open education opportunities
title: Using grantsgov
text: common workflow search open forecasted opportunities, filter deadline award size, sort results close date. Run search grant_search_opportunities().
code: education_filters <- list(   opportunity_status = grant_filter_one_of(c("posted", "forecasted")),   close_date = grant_filter_date_range(     start_date = Sys.Date(),     end_date = Sys.Date() + 90   ),   award_ceiling = grant_filter_number_range(min = 50000, max = 2000000) )  education_pagination <- grant_pagination(   page_offset = 1,   page_size = 5000,   sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending") )  str(education_filters) #> List of 3 #>  $ opportunity_status:List of 1 #>   ..$ one_of:List of 2 #>   .. ..$ : chr "posted" #>   .. ..$ : chr "forecasted" #>  $ close_date        :List of 2 #>   ..$ start_date: chr "2026-07-06" #>   ..$ end_date  : chr "2026-10-04" #>  $ award_ceiling     :List of 2 #>   ..$ min: num 50000 #>   ..$ max: num 2e+06 education_pagination #> $page_offset #> [1] 1 #>  #> $page_size #> [1] 5000 #>  #> $sort_order #> $sort_order[[1]] #> $sort_order[[1]]$order_by #> [1] "close_date" #>  #> $sort_order[[1]]$sort_direction #> [1] "ascending" education_results <- grant_search_opportunities(   query = "education",   filters = education_filters,   pagination = education_pagination )  length(education_results$data)

what: Common use case: find NIH grants in a subject area
title: Using grantsgov
text: search NIH opportunities particular area, use subject keyword filter Department Health Human Services top-level agency. NIH opportunities returned agency names “National Institutes Health”. Older Grants.gov-style parameters map current API like :
code: nih_cancer <- grant_search_opportunities(   query = "cancer",   filters = list(     top_level_agency = grant_filter_one_of(list("HHS")),     opportunity_status = grant_filter_one_of(c("posted", "forecasted"))   ),   pagination = grant_pagination(     page_size = 25,     sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending")   ) )  length(nih_cancer$data) keyword <- "education" limit <- 25  results <- grant_search_opportunities(   query = keyword,   pagination = grant_pagination(     page_offset = 1, # startRecordNum = 0     page_size = limit, # rows     sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending") # closeDate ASC   ) )

title: Using grantsgov
text: Search results include opportunity identifiers. Pass one identifiers grant_get_opportunity() retrieve full record. already know opportunity ID, call function directly.
code: first_id <- education_results$data[[1]]$opportunity_id first_opportunity <- grant_get_opportunity(first_id)  names(first_opportunity$data) grant_get_opportunity("12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012")

title: Using grantsgov
text: checking first response, pass grant_fetch_all() collect remaining pages query, filters, sort order, page size. request different page_size, grant_fetch_all() refetches page 1 API page numbers depend page size. can also use grant_paginate() endpoint function pagination argument, use grant_search_all_opportunities() search-specific defaults.
code: first_education_page <- grant_search_opportunities(   query = "education",   filters = education_filters,   pagination = grant_pagination(     page_size = 25,     sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending")   ) )  all_education_results <- grant_fetch_all(first_education_page)  length(all_education_results) attr(all_education_results, "pagination_info") all_education_results <- grant_fetch_all(first_education_page, page_size = 5000) all_education_results <- grant_search_all_opportunities(   query = "education",   filters = education_filters,   page_size = 5000,   sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending") )  length(all_education_results) attr(all_education_results, "pagination_info")

what: Common use case: find recently posted opportunities
title: Using grantsgov
text: Use grant_recent_opportunities() collect opportunities posted last day last week. API exposes post_date filter.
code: last_day <- grant_recent_opportunities("day") last_week <- grant_recent_opportunities("week")  length(last_day) length(last_week)

what: Export search results as CSV text
title: Using grantsgov
text: search endpoint can return CSV content. useful downstream workflow expects delimited file.
code: csv_text <- grant_search_opportunities(   query = "education",   filters = education_filters,   pagination = education_pagination,   format = "csv" )  cat(substr(csv_text, 1, 300))

what: Common use case: find recent bulk extracts
title: Using grantsgov
text: Bulk extracts useful want complete snapshot rather page search results. List available extract metadata grant_list_extracts(). Download one extract passing metadata record download URL grant_download_extract(). default output path temporary .csv file. Pass expected_file_size = extract$file_size_bytes verify downloaded byte count API metadata. Read CSV extract grant_read_extract(). downloads file, reads readr::read_csv(), warns readr reports parsing problems, stores downloaded file path attr(data, "file"). Use grant_list_all_extracts() automatically request every page extract metadata.
code: extract_filters <- list(   extract_type = "opportunities_csv",   created_at = grant_filter_date_range(Sys.Date() - 30, Sys.Date()) )  extract_pagination <- grant_pagination(   page_offset = 1,   page_size = 5000,   sort_order = grant_sort("created_at", "descending") )  extract_filters #> $extract_type #> [1] "opportunities_csv" #>  #> $created_at #> $created_at$start_date #> [1] "2026-06-06" #>  #> $created_at$end_date #> [1] "2026-07-06" extract_pagination #> $page_offset #> [1] 1 #>  #> $page_size #> [1] 5000 #>  #> $sort_order #> $sort_order[[1]] #> $sort_order[[1]]$order_by #> [1] "created_at" #>  #> $sort_order[[1]]$sort_direction #> [1] "descending" extracts <- grant_list_extracts(   filters = extract_filters,   pagination = extract_pagination )  length(extracts$data) extract_file <- grant_download_extract(   extracts$data[[1]],   expected_file_size = extracts$data[[1]]$file_size_bytes )  extract_file extract_data <- grant_read_extract(   extracts$data[[1]],   expected_file_size = extracts$data[[1]]$file_size_bytes )  attr(extract_data, "file") all_extracts <- grant_list_all_extracts(   filters = list(extract_type = "opportunities_csv"),   page_size = 5000 )  length(all_extracts)

title: Using grantsgov
text: API returns error, package reports HTTP status, short status-specific hint, API’s message body available, rate-limit headers returned gateway. 429 response includes retry/backoff guidance rate-limit metadata Retry-, X-RateLimit-Remaining, RateLimit-Reset present.
code: withr::with_envvar(   c(GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY = NA),   grant_api_key() ) #> Error: #> ! Set the GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY environment variable before calling the API.

code: @Manual{,   title = {grantsgov: Client for the Simpler Grants.gov API},   author = {John Muschelli},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},   url = {https://github.com/muschellij2/grantsgov}, }

what: Client for the Simpler Grants.gov API
title: Client for the Simpler Grants.gov API
text: grantsgov R client Simpler Grants.gov API https://api.simpler.grants.gov/docs#/. uses httr2 requests maps documented core endpoints: POST /v1/opportunities/search GET /v1/opportunities/{opportunity_id} POST /v1/extracts Set API key GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY environment variable:
code: Sys.setenv(GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY = "your-api-key")

title: Client for the Simpler Grants.gov API
code: # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("muschellij2/grantsgov")

title: Client for the Simpler Grants.gov API
code: if (file.exists("DESCRIPTION") && dir.exists("R")) {   pkgload::load_all(quiet = TRUE) } else {   library(grantsgov) } #> Warning: package 'testthat' was built under R version 4.4.1

title: Client for the Simpler Grants.gov API
text: examples run without API key inspect local package metadata.
code: grant_base_url() #> [1] "https://api.simpler.grants.gov" names(grant_endpoints()$endpoints) #> [1] "search_opportunities"   "search_agencies"        "get_opportunity"        #> [4] "get_opportunity_legacy" "list_extracts"          "common_grants"          #> [7] "organizations"          "health" grant_endpoints()$endpoints$health #> $method #> [1] "GET" #>  #> $path #> [1] "/health" #>  #> $function_name #> [1] "grant_health" grant_search_options()$sort_by #>  [1] "relevancy"             "opportunity_id"        "opportunity_number"    #>  [4] "opportunity_title"     "post_date"             "close_date"            #>  [7] "agency_code"           "agency_name"           "top_level_agency_name" #> [10] "award_floor"           "award_ceiling" grant_extract_options()$extract_type #> [1] "opportunities_json" "opportunities_csv" grant_rate_limit_headers() #> [1] "retry-after"           "x-ratelimit-limit"     "x-ratelimit-remaining" #> [4] "x-ratelimit-reset"     "ratelimit-limit"       "ratelimit-remaining"   #> [7] "ratelimit-reset"

title: Client for the Simpler Grants.gov API
text: helper constructors create nested request-body structures used API.
code: filters <- list(   opportunity_status = grant_filter_one_of(c("posted", "forecasted")),   applicant_type = grant_filter_one_of("nonprofits"),   close_date = grant_filter_date_range(     start_date = Sys.Date(),     end_date = Sys.Date() + 30   ),   award_ceiling = grant_filter_number_range(max = 1000000) )  pagination <- grant_pagination(   page_offset = 1,   page_size = 5000,   sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending") )  str(filters) #> List of 4 #>  $ opportunity_status:List of 1 #>   ..$ one_of:List of 2 #>   .. ..$ : chr "posted" #>   .. ..$ : chr "forecasted" #>  $ applicant_type    :List of 1 #>   ..$ one_of:List of 1 #>   .. ..$ : chr "nonprofits" #>  $ close_date        :List of 2 #>   ..$ start_date: chr "2026-05-05" #>   ..$ end_date  : chr "2026-06-04" #>  $ award_ceiling     :List of 1 #>   ..$ max: num 1e+06 pagination #> $page_offset #> [1] 1 #>  #> $page_size #> [1] 5000 #>  #> $sort_order #> $sort_order[[1]] #> $sort_order[[1]]$order_by #> [1] "close_date" #>  #> $sort_order[[1]]$sort_direction #> [1] "ascending"

title: Client for the Simpler Grants.gov API
text: chunk runs GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY set GRANTSGOV_README_LIVE=true. request CSV content instead JSON: search NIH grants subject area, use subject keyword filter Department Health Human Services top-level agency: translating older Grants.gov-style parameters like: use query, grant_sort(), grant_pagination(): collect every page inspecting first response, pass response grant_fetch_all(). reuses original query, filters, sort order, page size. want collect larger page size, pass page_size. API page numbers depend page size, grant_fetch_all() refetches page 1 requested page size differs first response. can also use grant_paginate() endpoint-specific wrapper grant_search_all_opportunities() prefer specify query one call.
code: results <- grant_search_opportunities(   query = "education",   filters = filters,   pagination = pagination )  length(results$data) csv_text <- grant_search_opportunities(   filters = list(opportunity_status = grant_filter_one_of("posted")),   pagination = grant_pagination(page_size = 100),   format = "csv" )  substr(csv_text, 1, 200) nih_cancer <- grant_search_opportunities(   query = "cancer",   filters = list(     top_level_agency = grant_filter_one_of(list("HHS")),     opportunity_status = grant_filter_one_of(c("posted", "forecasted"))   ),   pagination = grant_pagination(     page_size = 25,     sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending")   ) )  length(nih_cancer$data) params <- list(   keyword = keyword,   sortBy = "closeDate",   sortOrder = "ASC",   rows = limit,   startRecordNum = 0 ) keyword <- "education" limit <- 25  results <- grant_search_opportunities(   query = keyword,   pagination = grant_pagination(     page_offset = 1, # startRecordNum = 0     page_size = limit, # rows     sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending") # closeDate ASC   ) ) first_page <- grant_search_opportunities(   query = "education",   filters = filters,   pagination = grant_pagination(     page_size = 25,     sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending")   ) )  all_results <- grant_fetch_all(first_page)  length(all_results) attr(all_results, "pagination_info") all_results <- grant_fetch_all(first_page, page_size = 5000) all_results <- grant_search_all_opportunities(   query = "education",   filters = filters,   page_size = 5000,   sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending") )  length(all_results) attr(all_results, "pagination_info")

title: Client for the Simpler Grants.gov API
text: Use grant_recent_opportunities() paginate opportunities posted last day last week. API exposes post_date filter.
code: last_day <- grant_recent_opportunities("day") last_week <- grant_recent_opportunities("week")  length(last_day) length(last_week)

title: Client for the Simpler Grants.gov API
text: example needs real opportunity UUID API.
code: opportunity <- grant_get_opportunity(   "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012" )

title: Client for the Simpler Grants.gov API
text: metadata request runs GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY set GRANTSGOV_README_LIVE=true. Use CSV extract type want read downloaded data R. grant_download_extract() defaults temporary .csv file. Pass expected_file_size = extract$file_size_bytes verify downloaded byte count API metadata. grant_read_extract() downloads CSV extract, reads readr::read_csv(), warns readr reports parsing problems, stores downloaded file path attr(data, "file"). Use grant_list_all_extracts() automatically request page extract metadata.
code: extracts <- grant_list_extracts(   filters = list(     extract_type = "opportunities_csv",     created_at = grant_filter_date_range(Sys.Date() - 30, Sys.Date())   ),   pagination = grant_pagination(     page_size = 5000,     sort_order = grant_sort("created_at")   ) )  length(extracts$data) extract_file <- grant_download_extract(   extracts$data[[1]],   expected_file_size = extracts$data[[1]]$file_size_bytes )  extract_file extract_data <- grant_read_extract(   extracts$data[[1]],   expected_file_size = extracts$data[[1]]$file_size_bytes )  attr(extract_data, "file") all_extracts <- grant_list_all_extracts(   filters = list(extract_type = "opportunities_csv"),   page_size = 5000 )  length(all_extracts)

title: Client for the Simpler Grants.gov API
text: HTTP errors include status code, API-provided error message available, returned rate-limit headers Retry-, X-RateLimit-Remaining, RateLimit-Reset. 429 response reported retry/backoff guidance.

what: Read the Grants.gov API key from the environment — grant_api_key
title: Read the Grants.gov API key from the environment — grant_api_key
text: package looks API key GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY environment variable. endpoint functions call helper automatically.

title: Read the Grants.gov API key from the environment — grant_api_key
code: grant_api_key(required = TRUE)

title: Read the Grants.gov API key from the environment — grant_api_key
text: required TRUE, error GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY unset.

title: Read the Grants.gov API key from the environment — grant_api_key
text: scalar character API key, NULL required = FALSE key configured.

title: Read the Grants.gov API key from the environment — grant_api_key
code: grant_api_key(required = FALSE) #> NULL

what: Simpler Grants.gov API base URL — grant_base_url
title: Simpler Grants.gov API base URL — grant_base_url
text: Simpler Grants.gov API base URL

title: Simpler Grants.gov API base URL — grant_base_url
code: grant_base_url()

title: Simpler Grants.gov API base URL — grant_base_url
text: scalar character URL.

title: Simpler Grants.gov API base URL — grant_base_url
code: grant_base_url() #> [1] "https://api.simpler.grants.gov"

title: Retrieve CommonGrants opportunity details — grant_common_grants_get_opportunity
text: Maps GET /common-grants/opportunities/{oppId}.

title: Retrieve CommonGrants opportunity details — grant_common_grants_get_opportunity
code: grant_common_grants_get_opportunity(   opportunity_id,   api_key = grant_api_key(),   base_url = grant_base_url() )

title: Retrieve CommonGrants opportunity details — grant_common_grants_get_opportunity
text: opportunity_id CommonGrants opportunity ID. api_key API key. Defaults GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY. base_url API base URL.

title: Retrieve CommonGrants opportunity details — grant_common_grants_get_opportunity
text: Parsed JSON list.

title: Retrieve CommonGrants opportunity details — grant_common_grants_get_opportunity
code: if (nzchar(Sys.getenv("GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY")) &&     identical(tolower(Sys.getenv("GRANTSGOV_EXAMPLES_LIVE")), "true")) {   opportunities <- grant_common_grants_list_opportunities(page = 1, page_size = 1)   grant_common_grants_get_opportunity(opportunities$items[[1]]$id) }

title: List CommonGrants opportunities — grant_common_grants_list_opportunities

title: Download an extract file — grant_download_extract
text: extract Metadata list containing download_path download_url, scalar URL. path Local output path. title: Download an extract file — grant_download_extract
code: if (nzchar(Sys.getenv("GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY")) &&     identical(tolower(Sys.getenv("GRANTSGOV_EXAMPLES_LIVE")), "true")) {   extracts <- grant_list_extracts(     filters = list(extract_type = "opportunities_csv"),     pagination = grant_pagination(page_size = 1, sort_order = grant_sort("created_at"))   )   path <- grant_download_extract(     extracts$data[[1]],     expected_file_size = extracts$data[[1]]$file_size_bytes   )   path }

what: Fetch all records from a first-page response — grant_fetch_all
title: Fetch all records from a first-page response — grant_fetch_all
text: Takes output paginated endpoint call, grant_search_opportunities(), requests remaining pages using query, filters, sort options. convenience wrapper common workflow inspect first page decide collect matching records.

title: Fetch all records from a first-page response — grant_fetch_all
code: grant_fetch_all(   x,   page_size = NULL,   max_pages = Inf,   api_key = grant_api_key(),   base_url = NULL,   data_field = NULL )

title: Fetch all records from a first-page response — grant_fetch_all
text: x response object returned paginated grantsgov endpoint. page_size Optional page size full collection. NULL, function continues x using original page size. different original page size, first page requested avoid skipping records. max_pages Maximum total number pages include. api_key API key. Defaults GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY. base_url Optional API base URL override. Defaults URL used original response. data_field Response field containing page records. Defaults field recorded original endpoint, usually "data".

title: Fetch all records from a first-page response — grant_fetch_all
text: list records pages pagination_info attributes.

title: Fetch all records from a first-page response — grant_fetch_all
code: if (nzchar(Sys.getenv("GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY")) &&     identical(tolower(Sys.getenv("GRANTSGOV_EXAMPLES_LIVE")), "true")) {   first_page <- grant_search_opportunities(     query = "cancer",     filters = list(       top_level_agency = grant_filter_one_of("HHS"),       opportunity_status = grant_filter_one_of(c("posted", "forecasted"))     ),     pagination = grant_pagination(       page_size = 25,       sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending")     )   )   all_records <- grant_fetch_all(first_page)   length(all_records) }

title: Paginate through an endpoint — grant_paginate
text: Generic paginator endpoint wrappers accept pagination argument return data element plus optional pagination_info metadata. applies grant_search_opportunities() grant_list_extracts().

title: Paginate through an endpoint — grant_paginate
code: grant_paginate(   .f,   ...,   page_size = 5000,   page_offset = 1,   sort_order = NULL,   max_pages = Inf,   data_field = "data" )

title: Paginate through an endpoint — grant_paginate
text: .f Endpoint function, string naming one. ... Arguments passed .f. page_size Number records per page. page_offset First page offset. sort_order Optional sort specification passed grant_pagination(). max_pages Maximum number pages request. Use Inf continue API pagination metadata short page indicates completion. data_field Response field containing page records.

title: Paginate through an endpoint — grant_paginate
text: list records pages pagination_info attributes.

title: Paginate through an endpoint — grant_paginate
code: mock_endpoint <- function(pagination) {   list(     data = list(list(page = pagination$page_offset)),     pagination_info = list(       page_offset = pagination$page_offset,       page_size = pagination$page_size,       total_pages = 2     )   ) } grant_paginate(mock_endpoint, page_size = 2) #> [[1]] #> [[1]]$page #> [1] 1 #>  #>  #> [[2]] #> [[2]]$page #> [1] 2 #>  #>  #> attr(,"pages") #> attr(,"pages")[[1]] #> attr(,"pages")[[1]]$data #> attr(,"pages")[[1]]$data[[1]] #> attr(,"pages")[[1]]$data[[1]]$page #> [1] 1 #>  #>  #>  #> attr(,"pages")[[1]]$pagination_info #> attr(,"pages")[[1]]$pagination_info$page_offset #> [1] 1 #>  #> attr(,"pages")[[1]]$pagination_info$page_size #> [1] 2 #>  #> attr(,"pages")[[1]]$pagination_info$total_pages #> [1] 2 #>  #>  #>  #> attr(,"pages")[[2]] #> attr(,"pages")[[2]]$data #> attr(,"pages")[[2]]$data[[1]] #> attr(,"pages")[[2]]$data[[1]]$page #> [1] 2 #>  #>  #>  #> attr(,"pages")[[2]]$pagination_info #> attr(,"pages")[[2]]$pagination_info$page_offset #> [1] 2 #>  #> attr(,"pages")[[2]]$pagination_info$page_size #> [1] 2 #>  #> attr(,"pages")[[2]]$pagination_info$total_pages #> [1] 2 #>  #>  #>  #> attr(,"pagination_info") #> attr(,"pagination_info")[[1]] #> attr(,"pagination_info")[[1]]$page_offset #> [1] 1 #>  #> attr(,"pagination_info")[[1]]$page_size #> [1] 2 #>  #> attr(,"pagination_info")[[1]]$total_pages #> [1] 2 #>  #>  #> attr(,"pagination_info")[[2]] #> attr(,"pagination_info")[[2]]$page_offset #> [1] 2 #>  #> attr(,"pagination_info")[[2]]$page_size #> [1] 2 #>  #> attr(,"pagination_info")[[2]]$total_pages #> [1] 2 #>  #>   if (nzchar(Sys.getenv("GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY")) &&     identical(tolower(Sys.getenv("GRANTSGOV_EXAMPLES_LIVE")), "true")) {   grant_paginate(     grant_list_extracts,     page_size = 5000,     sort_order = grant_sort("created_at"),     max_pages = 1   ) }

text: extract Metadata list containing download_path download_url, scalar URL. path Local output path. Defaults temporary .csv file. overwrite FALSE, error path already exists. expected_file_size Optional expected downloaded file size bytes. ... Additional arguments passed readr::read_csv().

title: Download and read a CSV extract — grant_read_extract
text: tibble downloaded file path attr(x, "file").

title: Download and read a CSV extract — grant_read_extract
code: if (nzchar(Sys.getenv("GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY")) &&     identical(tolower(Sys.getenv("GRANTSGOV_EXAMPLES_LIVE")), "true")) {   extracts <- grant_list_extracts(     filters = list(extract_type = "opportunities_csv"),     pagination = grant_pagination(page_size = 1, sort_order = grant_sort("created_at"))   )   data <- grant_read_extract(     extracts$data[[1]],     expected_file_size = extracts$data[[1]]$file_size_bytes   )   attr(data, "file") }

title: Get recently posted opportunities — grant_recent_opportunities
text: Convenience wrapper getting opportunities posted last day last week. Simpler Grants.gov opportunity search endpoint exposes post_date filter, "created" opportunities interpreted opportunities posted within requested date window.

title: Get recently posted opportunities — grant_recent_opportunities
code: grant_recent_opportunities(   period = c("day", "week"),   days = NULL,   end_date = Sys.Date(),   query = NULL,   query_operator = c("AND", "OR"),   filters = list(),   page_size = 5000,   page_offset = 1,   sort_order = grant_sort("post_date"),   max_pages = Inf,   api_key = grant_api_key(),   base_url = grant_base_url() )

title: Get recently posted opportunities — grant_recent_opportunities
text: period Recent window, either "day" "week". days Optional custom number days look back. supplied, overrides period. end_date Last date date window. Defaults today. query Optional free-text query. query_operator Query operator, "" "". filters Additional search filters. include post_date; function sets period, days, end_date. page_size Number records per page. page_offset First page offset. sort_order Sort specification. Defaults post_date descending. max_pages Maximum number pages request. api_key API key. Defaults GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY. base_url API base URL.

title: Get recently posted opportunities — grant_recent_opportunities
text: list opportunity search records.

title: Get recently posted opportunities — grant_recent_opportunities
code: if (nzchar(Sys.getenv("GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY")) &&     identical(tolower(Sys.getenv("GRANTSGOV_EXAMPLES_LIVE")), "true")) {   last_day <- grant_recent_opportunities("day", max_pages = 1)   last_week <- grant_recent_opportunities("week", max_pages = 1)   length(last_day)   length(last_week) }

Defaults GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY. base_url API base URL.

title: Search grant opportunities — grant_search_opportunities
text: Maps POST /v1/opportunities/search.

title: Search grant opportunities — grant_search_opportunities
code: grant_search_opportunities(   query = NULL,   query_operator = c("AND", "OR"),   filters = list(),   pagination = grant_pagination(),   format = c("json", "csv"),   api_key = grant_api_key(),   base_url = grant_base_url() )

title: Search grant opportunities — grant_search_opportunities
text: query Optional free-text query, 100 characters. query_operator multiple query terms combined: "" "". filters Named list filters. Build values grant_filter_one_of(), grant_filter_date_range(), grant_filter_number_range(). Documented filter names include top_level_agency, funding_instrument, funding_category, applicant_type, opportunity_status, post_date, close_date, award_floor, award_ceiling, expected_number_of_awards, estimated_total_program_funding, assistance_listing_number, is_cost_sharing. pagination Pagination list. Defaults page 1 25 rows. format Response format, either "json" "csv". api_key API key. Defaults GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY. base_url API base URL.

title: Search grant opportunities — grant_search_opportunities
text: Parsed JSON list, CSV text format = "csv".

title: Search grant opportunities — grant_search_opportunities
code: filters <- list(   opportunity_status = grant_filter_one_of(c("posted", "forecasted")),   close_date = grant_filter_date_range(Sys.Date(), Sys.Date() + 90) ) pagination <- grant_pagination(   page_size = 5000,   sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending") )  if (nzchar(Sys.getenv("GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY")) &&     identical(tolower(Sys.getenv("GRANTSGOV_EXAMPLES_LIVE")), "true")) {   results <- grant_search_opportunities(     query = "education",     filters = filters,     pagination = pagination   )   length(results$data) }  # Translation of older Grants.gov-style parameters: # params = { #   "keyword": keyword, #   "sortBy": "closeDate", #   "sortOrder": "ASC", #   "rows": limit, #   "startRecordNum": 0 # } if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ keyword <- "education" limit <- 25 old_style_search <- grant_search_opportunities(   query = keyword,   pagination = grant_pagination(     page_offset = 1, # startRecordNum = 0 means the first page     page_size = limit, # rows     sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending") # closeDate ASC   ) ) } # }  # NIH grants in a subject area, such as cancer. nih_filters <- list(   top_level_agency = grant_filter_one_of(list("HHS")),   opportunity_status = grant_filter_one_of(c("posted", "forecasted")) ) if (nzchar(Sys.getenv("GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY")) &&     identical(tolower(Sys.getenv("GRANTSGOV_EXAMPLES_LIVE")), "true")) {   nih_cancer <- grant_search_opportunities(     query = "cancer",     filters = nih_filters,     pagination = grant_pagination(       page_size = 25,       sort_order = grant_sort("close_date", "ascending")     )   )   length(nih_cancer$data) }

title: grantsgov 0.0.0.9000
text: Added core Simpler Grants.gov API wrappers health checks, opportunity search, opportunity details, extracts, agency search, legacy opportunity ID lookup, CommonGrants opportunity endpoints, organization endpoints. Added authentication GRANTS_GOV_API_KEY environment variable improved HTTP error handling, including API validation messages rate-limit headers. Added pagination helpers, including grant_paginate(), grant_search_all_opportunities(), grant_list_all_extracts(), support page_size = 5000. Added grant_recent_opportunities() retrieving opportunities posted last day, last week, custom number days. Added extract download read helpers. grant_download_extract() now defaults temporary CSV path can validate file size, grant_read_extract() reads CSV extracts readr warns parse problems. Added README, vignette, roxygen examples exported functions, GitHub Actions workflows, Codecov coverage workflow, unit tests 100% coverage.
